tools.name: get_jobs
tools.description: Browse the latest remote job listings with optional filtering by country or worldwide availability

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search for remote jobs using keywords with optional filtering by country or worldwide availability

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Get full details for a specific job including description, requirements, salary, and application link. Use the company_slug and job_slug from job listings.

tools.name: get_related_jobs
tools.description: Find jobs similar to a specific job, based on skills, location, and category. Use after viewing a job to suggest alternatives.

tools.name: get_companies
tools.description: Browse remote-friendly companies with optional filtering by country or worldwide availability

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search for remote-friendly companies using keywords with optional country filtering

tools.name: get_company_details
tools.description: Get full details for a company including about, tech stack, benefits, open positions, and social links

tools.name: get_remote_work_statistics
tools.description: Get remote work statistics: top skills, job categories, industries, or countries by job/company count. Great for understanding the remote work landscape.

tools.name: get_salary_data
tools.description: Get salary benchmarks for remote jobs by job title, with optional seniority and country filters. Returns min, max, and median salary in USD.

tools.name: get_correct_country_name
tools.description: Resolve a country name to the correct format accepted by Himalayas filters. Useful for fuzzy matching user input.

tools.name: get_my_profile
tools.description: Get your Himalayas profile information. Requires authentication.

tools.name: save_job
tools.description: Save a job to your application tracker. Requires authentication.

tools.name: get_saved_jobs
tools.description: Get all jobs in your application tracker. Requires authentication.

tools.name: update_job_status
tools.description: Update a saved job's status or details. Requires authentication.

tools.name: remove_saved_job
tools.description: Remove a job from your application tracker. Requires authentication.

tools.name: update_profile
tools.description: Update your Himalayas profile. Requires authentication.

tools.name: add_experience
tools.description: Add a work experience to your Himalayas profile. Requires authentication.

tools.name: add_education
tools.description: Add an education entry to your Himalayas profile. Requires authentication.

tools.name: update_tech_stack
tools.description: Update your tech stack on your Himalayas profile. Requires authentication.

tools.name: search_talent
tools.description: Search for remote talent/candidates on Himalayas. Browse professionals by keyword, country, or role.

tools.name: get_talent_profile
tools.description: Get full details for a candidate including bio, all experiences, education, tech stack, social links, and more. Use the talent_slug from search_talent results.

tools.name: get_company_profile
tools.description: Get your company's profile on Himalayas. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: update_company_profile
tools.description: Update your company's profile on Himalayas. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: get_company_perks
tools.description: Get your company's perks/benefits on Himalayas. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: add_company_perk
tools.description: Add a perk/benefit to your company on Himalayas. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: remove_company_perk
tools.description: Remove a perk/benefit from your company on Himalayas. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: update_company_tech_stack
tools.description: Update your company's tech stack on Himalayas. Pass technology names (e.g., 'React', 'Python') and they'll be matched to the Himalayas stack database. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: list_company_jobs
tools.description: List your company's job postings on Himalayas. Shows status, views, clicks, and expiry. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: show_company_job
tools.description: Get full details of one of your company's job postings on Himalayas. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: create_company_job
tools.description: Post a new job on Himalayas. Jobs are free to post and require admin approval before going live. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: update_company_job
tools.description: Update an existing job posting on Himalayas. Only provide fields you want to change. For screening_questions, provide the full set — questions not included will be removed. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: delete_company_job
tools.description: Delete a job posting from your company on Himalayas. This action cannot be undone. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: post_job_public
tools.description: Post a job on Himalayas without an account. Provide your email and company details. Payment is required — a Stripe checkout URL will be returned. No authentication needed.

tools.name: purchase_job_extras
tools.description: Purchase paid extras for an existing job posting: sticky ($199), newsletter ($99). Returns a Stripe checkout URL. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: check_job_payment_status
tools.description: Check the payment status of a job posting. Use the session_id returned from post_job_public or create_company_job with extras. No authentication required.

tools.name: list_conversations
tools.description: List all your messaging conversations with last message preview. Shows conversation status (awaiting reply, new reply, read). Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: get_conversation
tools.description: Get full message history for a conversation. Accepts room_name or talent_slug. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: start_conversation
tools.description: Start a conversation with a candidate by talent slug. Optionally send an initial message. If the conversation already exists, returns it. Use search_talent to find candidates first, then use their slug here. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message in an existing conversation. Accepts room_name (from list_conversations) or talent_slug (from search_talent). Use start_conversation first if no conversation exists yet. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: mark_message_read
tools.description: Mark a message as read by its ID. Requires employer authentication.

tools.name: delete_conversation
tools.description: Delete a conversation. Accepts room_name or talent_slug. Requires employer authentication.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_conversations, get_conversation, mark_message_read · Private data: update_company_tech_stack · Public sink: create_company_job, post_job_public, start_conversation, send_message · Destructive: get_correct_country_name, remove_saved_job, remove_company_perk, delete_company_job, delete_conversation.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_conversations, get_conversation, mark_message_read · Private data: update_company_tech_stack · Public sink: create_company_job, post_job_public, start_conversation, send_message · Destructive: get_correct_country_name, remove_saved_job, remove_company_perk, delete_company_job, delete_conversation

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
